subject: [PATCH v6 7/7] locking: Add contended_release tracepoint to qrwlock

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch series extends the contended_release tracepoint to queued rwlocks, using an out-of-line traced unlock approach similar to that used for queued spinlocks.

2026-05-15.patch_summary: This patch series extends the contended_release tracepoint to queued rwlocks, using an out-of-line traced unlock approach similar to that used for queued spinlocks.
